name: merkle audit log: each checkpoint contains {seq, last_line_number, merkle_root, signature, timestamp}
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro compliance/audit-checkpoints .claude-tdd-pro/keys && echo "k" > .claude-tdd-pro/keys/audit.key && for i in $(seq 1 100); do bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event "e$i" --actor t --data {} --signing-key "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/keys/audit.key" >/dev/null 2>&1; done && for k in seq last_line_number merkle_root signature timestamp; do grep -E "\"$k\":" compliance/audit-checkpoints/0001.json >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL missing $k" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
